check_content_excerpt:
Verify that Audit Registry auditing has been enabled: 

Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> Audit Registry. 

If "Audit Registry" is not set to "Failure", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Object Access >> "Audit Registry" with "Failure" selected.
title: Windows 10 must be configured to audit registry failures.
